relations.note: Cardinality limit applies alongside CTA styling in CTA sections.

quotes: Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly
all multi-column layouts collapse to single column

rules.intent: Guarantee seamless section assembly and consistent responsive collapse.
rules.rule_text: Email body is 600px (size.canvas.email_body_width_600) fixed and centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. Mobile breakpoint is 480px (breakpoint.mobile.480), at which all multi-column layouts collapse to a single column.

quotes: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60)

rules.intent: Constrain layouts to a predictable set of column arrangements.
rules.rule_text: Internal section grid follows a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60, ratio.grid.image_text_40_60).

quotes: **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
this is what makes assembly seamless
no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking

rules.intent: Enforce consistent spacing so sections stack with zero external gaps.
rules.rule_text: Section side padding is 24px left/right (section.padding.sides) consistently across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm uses an 8px base unit (spacing.base.8) — all padding/margins are multiples of 8. Section top/bottom internal padding is 32px (section.padding.top_bottom); each section owns its own top AND bottom padding with no external margins between sections (assembly is zero-gap stacking). Spacing gaps: heading→body 16px, paragraph→paragraph 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body_16), body→callout/CTA 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout_24), image→caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.
min touch target 48px height (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas)

rules.intent: Maintain approved CTA treatment and accessible touch targets.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue #00529b background (cta.button.fill), White #ffffff text (cta.button.label.color), Nunito Sans Bold 16px label, padding 14px 32px (cta.button.padding), min touch target 48px height (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), and corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, cta.button.radius). Secondary CTA uses a White background, 2px Brand Blue border (border.secondary_cta.brand_blue_2px), and Brand Blue text with the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Preserve a single dominant action per section.
rules.rule_text: One primary CTA per section maximum.
